notes: Chi dinh dung OML_O21 de gui thong tin nguoi benh, ho so va dich vu xet nghiem sang LIS.
Cap nhat trang thai dung OML_O21 de tra trang thai lay mau, tiep nhan mau hoac huy mau ve HIS.
Tra ket qua dung ORU_R01 de gui ket qua, don vi, khoang tham chieu va canh bao ve HIS.
Mot so truong co the phu thuoc thiet lap chung nhu gui so dien thoai, ma benh an hoac thoi gian lay mau.

status.label: Ban tin cap nhat trang thai

fields.label: Loai ban tin
fields.note: Xac dinh ban tin la chi dinh, cap nhat trang thai hay tra ket qua.

fields.label: So phieu
fields.note: So phieu dung de tim phieu xet nghiem tren HIS.

fields.label: Ma nguoi benh
fields.note: Ma nguoi benh dung de doi chieu thong tin hanh chinh.

fields.label: Ten nguoi benh
fields.note: Ho ten nguoi benh hien thi tren phieu va man hinh LIS.

fields.label: Ngay sinh
fields.note: Ngay sinh nguoi benh, thuong dung dinh dang yyyyMMdd.

fields.label: Gioi tinh
fields.note: Gioi tinh nguoi benh: M nam, F nu.

fields.label: Dia chi
fields.note: Dia chi lien he cua nguoi benh.

fields.label: So dien thoai
fields.note: So dien thoai nguoi benh, co the bat/tat theo thiet lap chung.

fields.label: Loai luu tru
fields.note: Phan biet nguoi benh noi tru hay ngoai tru.

fields.label: Ma ho so
fields.note: Ma ho so dung de doi chieu dung dot dieu tri voi so phieu.

fields.label: Ma benh an
fields.note: Ma benh an, co the khong gui theo thiet lap chung.

fields.label: Ma lenh chi dinh
fields.note: Ma lenh cho biet chi dinh moi, da lay mau hoac huy mau.

fields.label: Ma trang thai LIS
fields.note: Ma trang thai mau: cho tiep nhan, chuan bi, da tiep nhan, da lay mau, huy mau.

fields.label: Ma lenh trong ket qua
fields.note: Ma lenh kem theo ban tin ket qua, thuong chi de tham khao.

fields.label: So phieu tren ORC
fields.note: So phieu tren tung dong lenh, dung de tham chieu voi MSH-10.

fields.label: Thoi gian giao dich/thuc hien
fields.note: Thoi gian phat sinh lenh hoac thoi gian thuc hien dich vu.

fields.note: Ten bac si chi dinh dich vu.

fields.label: Thoi gian lay mau
fields.note: Thoi gian mau duoc lay tai phong lay mau.

fields.note: Thoi gian mau duoc tiep nhan tai phong tiep nhan mau.

fields.label: Thoi gian tiep nhan mau
fields.note: Thoi gian tiep nhan mau kem theo ban tin ket qua.

fields.label: Ma nguoi lay mau
fields.note: Nguoi thuc hien thao tac lay mau.

fields.label: Ma loai doi tuong
fields.note: Loai doi tuong nguoi benh hoac thanh toan.

fields.label: Ma nguoi tiep nhan
fields.note: Nguoi tiep nhan mau tai khu vuc xet nghiem.

fields.label: STT OBR
fields.note: So thu tu dong xet nghiem trong ban tin.

fields.label: ID ket noi HIS

fields.note: Ten chi so xet nghiem duoc tra ket qua.

fields.note: Khoang tham chieu cua chi so.

fields.note: Thoi gian co ket qua; bat buoc voi ban tin tra ket qua.
